verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a rainbow of mercy around You It's calling me closer, closer The blood of Your Son has made me a way A way to come closer, closer

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For You delight in showing me mercy And you desire me to draw near Now You have caused me to come and approach you And I am blessed among men

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now there is one thing I will desire And there is one thing I will seek That I may behold You in all of your glory To gaze on the beauty of the King
